Original summary is generic and doesn't specify what 'status' means. Enhanced version clarifies the operation returns usage metrics and plan details, specifies authentication requirement, and indicates no state changes occur. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation (e.g., to check rate limits before making requests) and what data structure to expect.

data.current_description: Returns API account usage and plan details.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve current API account usage and plan details
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the authenticated user's API account status including current plan tier, usage statistics, rate limits, and quota information. data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't specify what 'status' means. Description lacks detail about what specific information is returned, authentication requirements, and whether this is a read-only operation. Enhanced version clarifies the operation returns usage metrics and plan details, specifies authentication requirement, and indicates no state changes occur. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation (e.g., to check rate limits before making requests) and what data structure to expect.
